rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARILYN A. CEREGHINO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Motion For An Order To Issue Citation
rulings.Rulings: It is hereby tentatively ordered that Objector, Katerine Valencia Lagenour's, Notice of Motion and Motion for A Petition for a Citation for Harold B. Mangar to Appear before the Court and be Examined under oath pursuant to Probate Code §8870, or Alternatively, to Appear for Depostion is hereby granted. It is hereby tentatively ordered that Harold B. Mangar appear for deposition at the offices of Carcione, Catermole, Dolinski, et al, located at 601 Brewster Avenue, Redwood City, California, on a date and time to be arranged by the parties. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on Deccember 10, 2013. If the tentative ruling is not argued, it will become the order of the court. Prevailing party to prepare the order.
